song.title: Hast Thou Not One Word for Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Lord, hast Thou not one word for me To bind my soul more close to Thee, That every evil I may flee; One word, O Lord, one word from Thee?
[V2] 2) One word, to show how weak am I When in my strength alone I try, In vain I toil, in vain I sigh; One word, O Lord, one word from Thee.
[V3] 3) One word, to show how near Thou art, For Thou dost dwell within my heart; And of Thy life I share a part; One word, O Lord, one word from Thee.
[V4] 4) One word of pow’r, oh, let me hear, Above the heart’s most anxious fear, Thy still, small voice, yet deep and clear; One word, O Lord, one word from Thee.
[V5] 5) One word of final triumph, Lord; Sweet hope Thy promises afford, To dwell with Thee in sweet accord; One word, O Lord, one word from Thee.
song.author: C L. Hamlen
